testcase.name: findsCommonAndSelectedGroupEntriesEffectiveDuringRequestedWeek

(set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists absence_record cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists academic_year cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists account cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists account_role cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists class cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists grade cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists grade_component cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists learning_result cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists leave_request cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists lesson_slot cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists notification cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists notification_recipient cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists parent cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists parent_student cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists school_event cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists semester cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists student cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists student_class_history cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists student_study_group cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists study_group cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists subject cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists teacher cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists teaching_assignment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists timetable cascade Hibernate: create table absence_record (absence_date date not null, class_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, leave_request_id bigint, recorded_by_teacher_id bigint, student_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, note TEXT, source enum ('LEAVE_REQUEST','SYSTEM','TEACHER_REPORT') not null, status enum ('EXCUSED_ABSENT','PENDING_VERIFICATION','UNEXCUSED_ABSENT') not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_absence_record_student_date_source unique (student_id, absence_date, source)) Hibernate: create table academic_year (end_date date not null, start_date date not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(50) not null unique, status enum ('ACTIVE','CLOSED','PLANNED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table account (created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, last_login_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, phone varchar(20) unique, username varchar(100) unique, email varchar(255), password_hash varchar(255) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','LOCKED','PASSWORD_RESET_REQUIRED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table account_role (account_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','PARENT','STUDENT','TEACHER') not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_account_role_account_role unique (account_id, role)) Hibernate: create table class (academic_year_id bigint not null, homeroom_teacher_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, class_code varchar(50) not null, class_name varchar(100) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table grade (attempt_no integer not null, is_published boolean not null, score numeric(4,2) not null, weight numeric(5,2) not null, class_id bigint not null, entered_by_teacher_id bigint not null, grade_component_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, published_at timestamp(6), semester_id bigint not null, student_id bigint not null, subject_id bigint not null, updated_by_account_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table grade_component (is_required boolean not null, weight numeric(5,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, code varchar(50) not null unique, name varchar(100) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table learning_result (average_score numeric(4,2), is_finalized boolean not null, academic_year_id bigint not null, class_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, finalized_at timestamp(6), finalized_by_account_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, semester_id bigint, student_id bigint not null, subject_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, conduct_label varchar(50), promotion_status varchar(50), rank_label varchar(50), description TEXT, result_type enum ('ANNUAL_SUMMARY','SEMESTER_SUMMARY','SUBJECT_ANNUAL','SUBJECT_SEMESTER') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table leave_request (from_date date not null, to_date date not null, class_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_id bigint not null, reviewed_at timestamp(6), reviewed_by_teacher_id bigint, student_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, reason TEXT not null, review_note TEXT, status enum ('APPROVED','CANCELLED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table lesson_slot (end_time time(0) not null, slot_index integer not null, start_time time(0) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, shift enum ('AFTERNOON','MORNING') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table notification (created_at timestamp(6) not null, created_by_account_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, related_entity_id bigint, related_student_id bigint, related_entity_type varchar(50), content TEXT not null, title varchar(255) not null, type enum ('ABSENCE','ANNOUNCEMENT','CLUB','EVENT','GRADE','LEAVE','SYSTEM','TUITION') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table notification_recipient (is_read boolean not null, account_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, notification_id bigint not null, read_at timestamp(6), delivery_status enum ('FAILED','PENDING','SENT') not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_notification_recipient_notification_account unique (notification_id, account_id)) Hibernate: create table parent (account_id bigint not null unique, id bigint generated by default as identity, full_name varchar(150) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table parent_student (is_primary_contact boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_id bigint not null, student_id bigint not null, relationship varchar(50), status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table school_event (end_time time(0), event_date date not null, is_all_day boolean not null, start_time time(0), class_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, created_by_account_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, published_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, cancellation_reason TEXT, description TEXT, location varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, participation_type enum ('OPTIONAL','REQUIRED') not null, scope enum ('CLASS','SCHOOL') not null, status enum ('CANCELLED','COMPLETED','DRAFT','PUBLISHED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table semester (end_date date not null, semester_index integer not null, start_date date not null, academic_year_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(50) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','CLOSED','PLANNED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table student (account_id bigint unique, current_class_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, student_code varchar(50) not null unique, full_name varchar(150) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','GRADUATED','INACTIVE','PENDING_CLASS_ASSIGNMENT','TRANSFERRED_OUT') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table student_class_history (end_date date, start_date date not null, academic_year_id bigint not null, class_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, student_id bigint not null, note varchar(500), status enum ('ACTIVE','CANCELLED','COMPLETED','TRANSFERRED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table student_study_group (effective_from date not null, effective_to date, academic_year_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, semester_id bigint not null, student_id bigint not null, study_group_id bigint not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table study_group (class_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, subject_cluster_id bigint not null, group_code varchar(50) not null, group_name varchar(100) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table subject (id bigint generated by default as identity, subject_code varchar(50) not null unique, subject_name varchar(100) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table teacher (account_id bigint not null unique, id bigint generated by default as identity, teacher_code varchar(50) not null unique, full_name varchar(150) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table teaching_assignment (academic_year_id bigint not null, class_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, semester_id bigint, subject_id bigint not null, teacher_id bigint not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table timetable (day_of_week integer not null, effective_from date not null, effective_to date, end_time time(0) not null, slot_index integer not null, start_time time(0) not null, class_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, lesson_slot_id bigint, semester_id bigint not null, study_group_id bigint, subject_id bigint not null, teacher_id bigint not null, room varchar(50), status enum ('ACTIVE','CANCELLED','DRAFT','INACTIVE','PUBLISHED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists absence_record add constraint FKegg5k9j86v1l25t8x725xjx2w foreign key (leave_request_id) references leave_request Hibernate: alter table if exists absence_record add constraint FKg9phqey7pe4to3p4bm1pdvi76 foreign key (recorded_by_teacher_id) references teacher Hibernate: alter table if exists absence_record add constraint FK9y8y1q89opjixhpd90ecaem9f foreign key (class_id) references class Hibernate: alter table if exists absence_record add constraint Hibernate: insert into lesson_slot (id, shift, slot_index, start_time, end_time) values (1, 'MORNING', 2, '08:25:00', '09:10:00')
Hibernate: insert into study_group (id, class_id, subject_cluster_id, group_code, group_name, status) values (10, 1, 100, '10A1-TN', '10A1 - Cụm Tự nhiên', 'ACTIVE'), (11, 1, 101, '10A1-XH', '10A1 - Cụm Xã hội', 'ACTIVE')
Hibernate: insert into timetable (id, semester_id, class_id, study_group_id, subject_id, teacher_id, lesson_slot_id, day_of_week, slot_index, start_time, end_time, room, effective_from, effective_to, status) values (1, 1, 1, null, 1, 1, 1, 1, 2, '08:25:00', '09:10:00', 'A101', '2026-08-01', '2026-12-31', 'PUBLISHED'), (2, 1, 1, null, 1, 1, 1, 2, 2, '08:25:00', '09:10:00', 'A101', '2026-08-01', '2026-12-31', 'DRAFT'), (3, 1, 1, null, 1, 1, 1, 4, 2, '08:25:00', '09:10:00', 'A101', '2026-09-01', '2026-12-31', 'PUBLISHED'), (4, 1, 1, 10, 1, 1, 1, 2, 2, '08:25:00', '09:10:00', 'A102', '2026-08-01', '2026-12-31', 'PUBLISHED'), (5, 1, 1, 11, 1, 1, 1, 3, 2, '08:25:00', '09:10:00', 'A103', '2026-08-01', '2026-12-31', 'PUBLISHED')
